Author: Ninethirty77
Name: The GreenZone
Description: Records observed Company Credits totals and shows weekly GC Seals tier progression, FC progress rings, and an optional overlay. Use /greenzone to open the window.
Changelog:
FC chest contributor integrity:
- Contributor credit now uses verified local inventory change events only.
- Removes the inferred tab-delta contribution path that could credit another member's chest additions.
- Requires the new contribution detection version for leaderboard credit while preserving normal FC chest stock sync.
